analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet states it is useful for China and the US to draw up three lists, without specifying content or evaluative language. Assessment per narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not promoted; no criticism of the US or West. CH2 (China benevolent power) – Not promoted; no mention of cooperation, multilateralism, or moral framing beyond a neutral procedural suggestion. CH3 (epic history) – Not relevant. CH4 (appropriate political system/values) – Not addressed. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – Not addressed. CH6 (culture/nature) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet is neutral and does not clearly promote any listed narrative.
